sections.title: Background and Rationale
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Summarize disease context, comparator landscape, clinical equipoise, and the rationale for a randomized controlled design.

sections.title: Objectives
sections.llm_prompt_hint: State primary, secondary, and exploratory objectives aligned to the randomized comparison.

sections.title: Study Design
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe the phase, treatment arms, allocation ratio, treatment duration, visits, and overall trial schema.

sections.title: Eligibility Criteria
sections.llm_prompt_hint: List inclusion and exclusion criteria that support safety, internal validity, and feasibility.

sections.title: Study Procedures
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Outline screening, treatment, assessments, dose modifications, concomitant care, follow-up, and visit windows.

sections.title: Outcome Measures
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Define primary and secondary efficacy and safety endpoints, estimands, and assessment timing.

sections.title: Statistical Analysis Plan
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Specify analysis populations, hypothesis framework, sample size justification, primary analysis, sensitivity analyses, subgroup analyses, and missing data handling.

sections.title: Ethical Considerations
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Cover informed consent, risk-benefit assessment, subject confidentiality, safety oversight, and protocol deviations.

sections.title: Data Management
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe EDC capture, monitoring, source data verification, audit trail, query management, and archival.

sections.title: References
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Compile cited literature, standards, and trial methodology references.

sections.title: Randomization and Allocation Concealment
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe sequence generation, stratification factors, allocation concealment, implementation responsibilities, and emergency unmasking dependencies.

sections.title: Blinding Procedures
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe who is blinded, how masking is maintained, allowed unblinding scenarios, and bias mitigation if open-label.

sections.title: Interim Analysis
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Define interim timing, alpha-spending or decision boundaries, data monitoring review, and stopping rules for efficacy, futility, and safety.
